basic_details.job_title: KSLSA Section Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Section Officer Posts
basic_details.total_vacancies: 19 Posts (17 under Residual Parent Cadre + 2 under Kalyana Karnataka Region)
basic_details.short_information: The latest Karnataka State Legal Services Authority (KSLSA) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Section Officer posts under Residual Parent Cadre and Kalyana Karnataka Region! Published at karnataka.nalsa.gov.in, this new recruitment drive offers 19 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the 18-45 years age group (with relaxations) and possessing LL.B degree from a recognized university can apply online. Find all details about the KSLSA Section Officer new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, online form, and notification PDF here.

application_fee.details: For General Merit / Category - II(A)/ II(B)/ III(A)/ III(B): ₹1,000/- For Scheduled Caste / Scheduled Tribe / Category-I / Persons with Benchmark Disability: ₹500/-

qualification.details: Nationality: Candidate must be a citizen of India. | Section Officer

salary_details.additional benefits: Allowances as applicable under Karnataka government rules
salary_details.details: Pay scale as per Karnataka Government rules for the post of Section Officer.

selection_process: Competitive Examination (Offline OMR – Paper-I & Paper-II). Interview (Viva-Voce). Final selection on the basis of merit in the written examination and interview.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through https://cetonline.karnataka.gov.in/kea/indexnew.
Upload recent passport size photograph and signature in JPG format (as per specifications).
Pay application fee online through payment gateway.
Keep printout of the submitted application for future reference.
Last date for submission of online application is 15 May 2026.
important_instructions: Read the detailed advertisement carefully before filling the online application. Upload correct Photograph and Signature as per specifications. No documents to be uploaded at the time of application; originals to be produced at document verification / interview stage. Keep registered mobile number and email active till completion of the recruitment process. Application fee once paid will not be refunded. KSLSA reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process without assigning any reason.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in KSLSA Section Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: KSLSA has notified 19 Section Officer vacancies, including 17 posts under Residual Parent Cadre and 2 posts under Kalyana Karnataka Region, distributed category‑wise as per Karnataka reservation norms.

faq.question: Q2. What are the application dates for KSLSA Section Officer 2026?
faq.answer: The online application starts in April 2026 and the last date to submit the online form and pay the fee is 15 May 2026, through the KEA portal linked from the KSLSA website.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for KSLSA Section Officer posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an LL.B degree from a recognised university in India to be eligible for the Section Officer post; no other stream is accepted in place of LL.B.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for KSLSA Section Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As on 16 April 2026, the minimum age is 18 years. The maximum age is 40 years for General Merit, 43 years for Category II(A)/II(B)/III(A)/III(B), and 45 years for SC/ST and Category‑I candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What are the category‑wise vacancies under Residual Parent Cadre and Kalyana Karnataka Region?
faq.answer: Under Residual Parent Cadre (17 posts): General Merit – 8, SC – 3, ST – 1, Cat‑I – 1, Cat‑II(A) – 2, Cat‑II(B) – 1, Cat‑III(A) – 1, Cat‑III(B) – 0. Under Kalyana Karnataka Region (2 posts): General Merit – 1 and SC – 1.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for KSLSA Section Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Application fee is ₹1,000 for General Merit, Category II(A)/II(B)/III(A)/III(B) candidates and ₹500 for SC/ST/Category‑I and Persons with Benchmark Disability (PwBD), payable online via the KEA payment gateway.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for KSLSA Section Officer 2026?
faq.answer: Selection consists of an offline competitive examination (OMR) with Paper‑I & Paper‑II, followed by an Interview (Viva‑voce). The final merit list is prepared based on combined performance in the written exam and viva‑voce.

faq.question: Q8. What is the pay scale for KSLSA Section Officer posts?
faq.answer: Section Officers will receive a pay scale of ₹69,250‑1,650‑74,200‑1,900‑85,600‑2,300‑99,400‑2,700‑1,15,600‑3,100‑1,34,200, along with allowances as per Karnataka Government rules, with a probation period of 2 years (extendable if required).
